RT by @coleadamss: In 8th grade, I was prompted, “Where do you see yourself in 10 years?” My answer: “Out of college as a basketball sportscaster.”

I’m living my dream.

First full-time season in the books with @CollegeSportsCo! From ballroom hoops to rivalry games, holiday invitationals, conference tourneys, and the March Madness stage. Countless hours of research, every edit, every mile traveled… all part of what makes this journey awesome.

“Appreciate the game. Celebrate its people. Make somebody new smile today.” That’s how I sign off every show, and that’s exactly how I’ll sign off this great 2025–26 season.

RT by @coleadamss: Reflection is important as human beings & as we hit the end of another college hoops season, I do a lot of it. Grateful & proud are understatements!!!

First season doing this all full time has taught me a lot, I try to continuously learn & grow but this season has felt different. Launching the pod, hosting a live event for 100+ people, connecting with tons of players & coaches, traveling all over the nation because of this sport has been so enjoyable. And to do it all independently makes me proud of myself & the sport for adapting. I have put more effort & hours into work than ever before in my life building it all in an untraditional way - some people don’t like that because it’s *different* and that’s fine, truly (but I’m not going anywhere 😁). You can carve your own lane in your life, don’t always have to follow in the paths of others.

Thank you to the fans for making the sport great & always showing love to me. Thank you to the programs, coaches, players & staffs for opening their doors to me & working together. Shoutout to Homefield & partners for making things happen. And special one to Jess, Adam, Evan & the fam for continuous love & support. Most important shoutout to Sophie & Reese too, my girls. 

I love you college basketball. 🫶❤️

(Now onto the transfer portal 😅)

R to @coleadamss: Shoutout my boys though @Sam_Federman and @JonathanLidskin 

Friends for years but finally meeting was super cool. Just two dudes that get the fun of the sport but also are incredibly smart. Glad we finally met 😭

The college basketball community is very special 

I had my first true experience this weekend and had an incredible experience. So many people doing so many different things. 

I will never miss another Final Four again. It was awesome to get the true experience
